SC 13D
Subject Company: Example Income Fund
Subject Company CIK: 0009990001
Title of Class: Common Shares
CUSIP: 123456789
Item 4. Purpose of Transaction
The Reporting Person acquired shares because the fund trades at a discount to net asset value and may seek a self-tender offer.
Item 5. Interest in Securities of the Issuer
The Reporting Person beneficially owns 1,234,567 shares, representing 6.4% of the class.
